summary: Iteration 3 retest of two iter2 fixes for Zero-Based Budgeting CAD app. Both fixes verified PASS end-to-end. (1) Backend POST /api/reset now clears categories AND calls _recompute_account_targets — verified with new pytest: after seeding 21 categories then resetting, GET /api/categories returns [] and all 4 account.target values are 0.0. (2) Frontend add-expense.tsx selectCategory() now sets BOTH sourceAccount and payoffAccount to cat.parent_account unconditionally — verified with Playwright UI flow: tapping Groceries (variable bucket) auto-activates the Variable source pill, and saving with method=cash debits the Variable bucket (1000→925, Δ=75). Credit path also re-tested: tapping Groceries with default method=credit shows the Variable payoff pill active, and saving creates a credit expense with payoff_account=variable, increasing variable.owed_to_cards by exactly 60. category_id is correctly attached and dashboard.categories.spent_this_month for Groceries = 75.

issues: Pre-existing console warnings unchanged: 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents deprecated → use style.pointerEvents. Cosmetic, non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: Both reported iter2 bugs are now fixed correctly. /api/reset implementation at server.py:590 deletes accounts/cards/incomes/expenses/categories/recurring, calls ensure_seed(), then _recompute_account_targets() — clean. selectCategory() at add-expense.tsx:39 now updates both sourceAccount and payoffAccount unconditionally — clean.
Pre-existing iter2 note still applies: server.py is ~720 lines; consider splitting into routers as more endpoints are added.
Pre-existing iter2 note still applies: POST /api/categories/{id}/run has no idempotency guard for the same month.
seed_data_creation: Tests reset and re-seed budget around runs. Final state at end of iteration: /api/reset followed by /api/seed-budget — 21 categories present, all balances zero, no TEST_ data leaking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both iter2 fixes confirmed via /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3_fixes.py and Playwright UI flow against the deployed Expo web preview at https://budget-zero-app.preview.emergentagent.com. Run full regression with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v
rca_of_issue: N/A — retest only; both reported bugs are fixed.
